summary: Set 083 S3 (final): instruction surfaces + the operator-ordered skip removal (spec Revision 1) + supersession of UAT/releases by Set 084 (spec Revision 2). Surfaces: start-here.md.template teaches mandatory verify_session -> close_session (no skip branch, no 'automatic' claims, venv-qualified invocations everywhere an engine is told what to run); start_session prints the mandatory-verification advisory; cold-start goldens + dist bundle regenerated; Marketplace/root READMEs and all canonical docs re-taught. Enforcement: check_verification_integrity refuses null-verdict Full-tier closes (skipped/manual-via-other-engine legal only under the zero-budget budget.yaml declaration); routed_gate retired as a skip authority (always REQUIRED, exit 0; predicate informational via predicate_required); e2e harness declares the zero-budget tier it factually is; S3's bare runtime_mode import fixed (test_production_imports). Verification: 5 rounds gpt-5-4 via the S1 CLI, rounds 1-4 each a distinct real finding (superseded-spec framing -> Revision 1 recorded; Marketplace README taught the gated flow; bare-python advisories; untracked artifacts), round 5 VERIFIED against the committed tree. Consensus (2 independent models) + synthesis produced Set 084 (identity = registry-resolved model, dynamic verifier exclusion, stamped evidence, close backstop), which inherits this set's UAT text assertions and ships the combined router 0.29.0 release. Suites: Layer-1 2575 passed / 5 baseline skips; Layer-2 mocha 1270 passing.
